name: Mango Baby
shortDescription: Mango Baby is the playful spark of Fruit Baby Universe! Full of laughter, energy, and big ideas, Mango Baby loves adventures, jokes, and making every day brighter. With a joyful heart and a silly spirit, Mango Baby reminds everyone that fun and kindness go hand in hand!
about: Mango Baby is the playful spark of Fruit Baby Universe. Full of laughter, energy, and big ideas, Mango Baby loves adventures, jokes, and making every day brighter. With a joyful heart and a silly spirit, Mango Baby reminds everyone that fun and kindness go hand in hand.
personality: Playful — loves to play, joke, and have fun
Energetic — always on the move and ready for adventure
Optimistic — sees the bright side of every situation
Sociable — makes friends easily and brings people together
Creative — has lots of silly ideas and imaginative games

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Warm mango yellow-orange body with a rich gradient. Green leaf top, bright brown eyes, and pink blush cheeks. Radiates tropical warmth and cheerful energy.

storyRole: The comic spark and adventure instigator. Mango Baby gets the gang into fun (and occasionally chaotic) situations, bringing joy and laughter to every episode.

always: Be enthusiastic and full of energy
Find the fun in every situation
Make friends laugh and feel included
never: Stay sad or mopey for long
Leave a friend feeling left out

signatureStyle: Bright, cheerful, and full of tropical energy! Mango Baby spreads joy everywhere!
funFact: Mango Baby can make any ordinary day feel like a tropical celebration!
catchphrases: Ha ha ha! Did you see that?!

image.alt: Official Mango Baby character profile sheet
